codeTracer.summary: The agent failed to complete the task (summarizing the camping topic page at 127.0.0.1:8765/xhs/topic/camping-confirm) due to an infrastructure-level tool policy block on web_fetch. Step 1 is a synthetic diagnostic artifact showing the block; Step 2 is the agent honestly reporting the failure. No agent logic errors, mislocalized edits, or redundant exploration occurred. Root cause is infrastructure configuration: the web_fetch tool blocking policy prevented the agent from accessing a localhost URL that it was tasked to read.
